note: seq=18: V2 SMART BRAIN intelligence layer (EV queue prioritization, cost-aware waterfall, breach forecast). 8/8 fail-closed proof gate + --selftest => auto-rollback if anything is off. Additive-only; recommends pre-throttle, NEVER severs the pipe; .gov/.mil excluded from ranking. No-ops (mode=idle, neutral FIFO prior) until outcomes accumulate.

steps.note: seq=18: V2 Smart Brain. Fetch 6 modules -> /opt/atlas/brain; sha-verify; FAIL-CLOSED 8/8 proof gate (atlas_brain_proof.py); --migrate brain tables (additive, hetzner); --selftest gate; install atlas-brain.service/.timer (5min); first --once. Additive + recommends-only (never severs pipe); no-ops gracefully until queue/outcomes flow.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,sys,urllib.request as u; os.makedirs('/opt/atlas/brain',exist_ok=True); base=sys.argv[1]; [u.urlretrieve(base+'/scripts/'+f,'/opt/atlas/brain/'+f) for f in ['enrichment_brain_v2.py','jarvis_v2.py','guardians_v2.py','v1_baseline.py','atlas_brain_proof.py','atlas_smart_brain.py']]; print('fetched brain')" "$BRAIN_URL"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/brain/enrichment_brain_v2.py':'bff19e9aeaa1a2afd6530c1a53654db92c838a72967240272bbc141538eaa068','/opt/atlas/brain/jarvis_v2.py':'2ec85ecb6992b02f57ef96715bb19afeff1caea0a74f5cb60be6df93da62e039','/opt/atlas/brain/guardians_v2.py':'cf426c7f36931aa41ec45d132e50e4100564833d8a22282902f6b675f2308edd','/opt/atlas/brain/v1_baseline.py':'a245832652265a7b15b078fec270aaeb8993c685c6a839e42089fa63586461ed','/opt/atlas/brain/atlas_brain_proof.py':'fa68bd89b185329b84c17375bd798c7939a0078f636d4ae2b926e78372be9762','/opt/atlas/brain/atlas_smart_brain.py':'199a9ddb27eb395d585e029bceb020cee3cb3e8d5875a1f2cc1e4ff17565d6a7'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('brain sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS V2 Smart Brain (EV queue prioritization + breach forecast; recommends, never severs)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_AUTOPULL_CONF=/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/brain/atlas_smart_brain.py --once
TimeoutStartSec=10min

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS V2 Smart Brain decision pass every 5 min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=6min
OnUnitActiveSec=5min
RandomizedDelaySec=20
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-brain.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
